rationale: The cited paper centers on loss aversion/endowment-effect boundaries, whereas the citing paper note emphasizes discrepant fluency in customization and does not explicitly list loss aversion as a focal construct. Still, the citing studies use add-vs-reject framing and price-gap judgments that could plausibly draw on loss-aversion theory, and the evidence provided is only a DOI match without local citation context, so this cannot be safely dropped.
